case_title: JACOB DIAMOND VS. YONG HAO ZHAO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,155.71 FILED BY DIAMOND, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT ZHAO, YONG HAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZHAO, YONG HAO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-16-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS AT TODAYS HEARING AND HE DID NOT BRING AN INTERPRETER TO ASSIST HIM TODAY. DEFENDANT MUST BRING HIS OWN INTERPRETER TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---SOON O. ESKEW. PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS SUBMITTED IN COURT TODAY 1/16/14 BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (SUBMITTED IN COURT TODAY 1/16/14) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND, JACOB

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND, JACOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHAO, YONG HAO $2,155.71 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,260.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, UPDATING COURT WITH DEFENDANT'S CURRENT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND, JACOB
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.
